fields.title: Sunset Hour Street Taco Trio
fields.summary: Three adobada tacos and a house agua fresca for $11 from 4-6pm.
fields.body: Our patio happy-hour bundle is built for after-work drop-ins with fast pickup and walk-up ordering.

fields.title: Now Serving the Late Crowd
fields.summary: Kitchen hours now run until 11:30pm on Fridays and Saturdays.
fields.body: We extended service after repeated customer requests for a true late-night taco stop near downtown Ventura.

fields.title: Mariachi Patio Night
fields.summary: Live mariachi returns this Thursday at 7pm.
fields.body: We are turning the front patio into a neighborhood set with family-style snack platters and cold horchata.

fields.title: Why Our Tortillas Changed This Season

fields.body: We wanted a more realistic editorial card mixed into the feed instead of only deals and event promos.

fields.title: Why We Roast a Little Lighter for Summer
fields.summary: A behind-the-bar look at the fruit-forward espresso profile we are using this month.
fields.body: Our bar team wanted a brighter iced latte base that still cuts through oat milk and house-made syrups.

fields.title: Iced Latte + Pan Dulce Combo
fields.summary: Any iced latte paired with a guava cream pastry for $9 until 2pm.
fields.body: This is our busiest grab-and-go pairing during the morning rush for downtown office traffic.

fields.title: Mobile Order Shelf Added
fields.summary: Pickup is faster now with a dedicated mobile-order shelf near the front counter.
fields.body: We finally separated in-store and mobile pickup flow so the line does not bottleneck near the pastry case.

fields.title: Sunrise Cupping Session

fields.title: After Dark Maker Pop-Up

fields.title: Parking Validation Expanded
